title: Luigi Villagers
description: What more do I have to tell you. The Villagers are Luigi.
body:
Funny to see him in a Village instead of a Woodland Mansion, isn't it?

Luigi Villagers is quite simple. It's Luigi Villagers... with Mario as a Wandering Trader.
This pack was made as a lovely joke in 2021, and has tormented my friend group ever since.
It was released publicly long ago, but never on Modrinth. I stand here to correct that mistake.

The current release only retextures the Villager and Wandering Trader, none of the Illagers are affected. I've had ideas for them, as I'm sure many people can easily come up with some of the obvious ones. But I've never had the motivation to continue work on this pack. If anyone else wishes to contribute, feel free to get in touch.

I highly recommend turning Friendly Creatures to 1%. or off. Or 100%. I'm not your mom, I can't tell you what to do.
